name: RebarMesh
summary: The RebarMesh class represents a reinforcement mesh.

constructors.name: RebarMesh
constructors.summary: Initializes a new mesh instance with empty attributes.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares Identifiers of model objects.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the reinforcement mesh instance with the given identifier from the model database.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Check if Identifiers of model objects are same.

methods.name: GetAllReportProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

methods.name: GetAllUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

methods.name: GetAssembly
methods.summary: Returns the assembly that the reinforcement belongs to.

methods.name: GetChildren
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the children model objects.

methods.name: GetCoordinateSystem
methods.summary: Returns the coordinate system for the given model object.

methods.name: GetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Gets custom object type name from an existing object.

methods.name: GetDoubleReportProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple double report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all double properties for the model object.

methods.name: GetDynamicStringProperty
methods.summary: Gets a dynamic string property from the model object.

methods.name: GetFatherComponent
methods.summary: Returns the father component of the model object.

methods.name: GetFatherPour
methods.summary: Returns the pour that the rebar is associated to.

methods.name: GetFatherPourUnit
methods.summary: Returns the pour unit that the rebar is associated to.

methods.name: GetHierarchicObjects
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected hierarchic objects.

methods.name: GetIntegerReportProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple integer report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer properties for the model object.

methods.name: GetNumberOfRebars
methods.summary: Returns the number of rebars in the reinforcing group.

methods.name: GetPhase
methods.summary: Retrieves the phase of the model object (the phase number, the phase name, the phase comment and whether the phase is the current one or not).

methods.name: GetRebarComplexGeometries(Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.summary: Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarComplexGeometry). These objects contain physical curves in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. RebarComplexGeometry only differs from RebarGeometry by containing a polycurve rather than a polyline.

methods.name: GetRebarComplexGeometries(Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Reinforcement.RebarGeometrySimplificationTypeEnum)
methods.summary: Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarComplexGeometry). These objects contain physical curves in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. RebarComplexGeometry only differs from RebarGeometry by containing a polycurve (of Arc and LineSegment objects) rather than a polyline. The polycurve only contains arcs if the "simplified" parameter is RATIONALIZED or FABRICATION. If "simplified" is NONE, any arcs will be returned as a series of line segments.

methods.name: GetRebarGeometries(Boolean)
methods.summary: Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarGeometry). These objects contain physical points in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar.

methods.name: GetRebarGeometries(Reinforcement.RebarGeometryOptionEnum)
methods.summary: Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarGeometry). These objects contain physical points in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar.

methods.name: GetRebarGeometriesWithoutClashes
methods.summary: Retrieves a list of physical reinforcing bars (of type RebarGeometry). These objects contain physical points in the 3D space of each reinforcing bar as shown in model view. In case rebar polygon clashes with itself, physical points are moved to avoid clashing.

methods.name: GetReportProperty(String, Double.)
methods.summary: Retrieves a double property of the report for the model object.

methods.name: GetReportProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.summary: Retrieves an integer property of the report for the model object.

methods.name: GetReportProperty(String, String.)
methods.summary: Retrieves a string property of the report for the model object.

methods.name: GetSingleRebar
methods.summary: Returns a single rebar inside the rebar group located by the given index. The indexing starts from the start point. The rebar represents a physical reinforcing bar and contains physical points in the 3D space of the bar. The method returns null on error, for example if given an erroneous index. The number of rebars in the group can be requested with GetNumberOfRebars().

methods.name: GetSingleRebarWithoutClash
methods.summary: Returns a single rebar inside the rebar group located by the given index. The indexing starts from the start point. The rebar represents a physical reinforcing bar and contains physical, non-clashing points in the 3D space of the bar. The method returns null on error, for example if given an erroneous index. The number of rebars in the group can be requested with GetNumberOfRebars().

methods.name: GetSolid
methods.summary: Method for getting the solid information of the reinforcement.

methods.name: GetStringReportProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple string report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all string properties for the model object.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.summary: Retrieves a double property for the model object.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.summary: Retrieves an integer property for the model object.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.summary: Retrieves a string property for the model object.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the reinforcement mesh into the model database. All the attributes must be set.

methods.name: IsGeometryValid
methods.summary: Tells whether the geometry of a reinforcement object is valid or not.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the existing reinforcement mesh in the model database to match the current one.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects a reinforcement mesh from the model database. The reinforcement identifier must be set.

methods.name: SetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Sets a custom object type name for an existing object.

methods.name: SetDynamicStringProperty
methods.summary: Sets a dynamic string property for the model object.

methods.name: SetLabel
methods.summary: Sets a label for an object when a new instance is created, this method must be called before Insert. The label is used in plug-ins for identifying the changed object in modification.

methods.name: SetPhase
methods.summary: Sets the phase of the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperties
methods.summary: Sets multiple properties for the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the model object.

properties.name: CatalogName
properties.summary: The name of the rebar mesh catalog.

properties.name: Class
properties.summary: Gets or sets the class of the reinforcement. The class is used to group reinforcements.

properties.name: CrossBarLocation
properties.summary: Defines the location of the crossing bars.

properties.name: CrossDistances
properties.summary: The crossing spacing double value(s).

properties.name: CrossSize
properties.summary: The size of the crossing rebar.

properties.name: CutByFatherPartCuts
properties.summary: Defines whether the rebar mesh is cut by father part cuts or not.

properties.name: EndFromPlaneOffset
properties.summary: The end offset value from the part surface.

properties.name: EndHook
properties.summary: The hook at the end of the reinforcing.

properties.name: EndPoint
properties.summary: The end point of the direction in which the longitudinal bars are distributed.

properties.name: EndPointOffsetType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the end point offset. The options are: OFFSET_TYPE_LEG_LENGTHOFFSET_TYPE_COVER_THICKNESS

properties.name: EndPointOffsetValue
properties.summary: Gets or sets the concrete cover thickness or leg length at the second end of the bar.

properties.name: Father
properties.summary: Gets or sets the father object of the reinforcement; the model object instance to operate on.

properties.name: FromPlaneOffset
properties.summary: The offset value from the part surface applied in both sides.

properties.name: Grade
properties.summary: Gets or sets the steel grade of the reinforcing bar. The grade indicates the strength of the steel used in reinforcing bars. It can also indicate other factors, such as the weldability or surface deformations of the bar.

properties.name: Identifier
properties.summary: The identifier of the object.

properties.name: InputPointDeformingState
properties.summary: Gets or sets the reinforcement input point deforming state.

properties.name: IsUpToDate
properties.summary: Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.

properties.name: LeftOverhangCross
properties.summary: The overhang of the crossing part's left side.

properties.name: LeftOverhangLongitudinal
properties.summary: The overhang of the longitudinal bar's left side.

properties.name: Length
properties.summary: The length of the rectangle rebar mesh.

properties.name: LongitudinalDistances
properties.summary: The longitudinal spacing double value(s).

properties.name: LongitudinalSize
properties.summary: The size of the longitudinal rebar.

properties.name: LongitudinalSpacingMethod
properties.summary: The type of spacing between rebar mesh bars. Used both for longitudinal and crossing bars. The options are (RebarMesh.RebarMeshSpacingMethodEnum.): SPACING_TYPE_SAME_DISTANCESPACING_TYPE_MULTIPLE_VARYING_DISTANCES

properties.name: MeshType
properties.summary: The type of the reinforcement mesh. The options are: RECTANGULAR_MESHPOLYGON_MESHBENT_MESH

properties.name: ModificationTime
properties.summary: Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the reinforcement.

properties.name: NumberingSeries
properties.summary: Gets or sets the numbering series of the reinforcement.

properties.name: OnPlaneOffsets
properties.summary: Gets or sets the double offset value for each leg on the same plane as the bar.

properties.name: Polygon
properties.summary: The polygon of the mesh.

properties.name: RadiusValues
properties.summary: Gets or sets the radius value(s) of the bends in the bar.

properties.name: RightOverhangCross
properties.summary: The right overhang of the crossing bar.

properties.name: RightOverhangLongitudinal
properties.summary: The right overhang of the longitudinal bar.

properties.name: StartFromPlaneOffset
properties.summary: The start offset value from the part surface.

properties.name: StartHook
properties.summary: The hook at the beginning of the reinforcing.

properties.name: StartPoint
properties.summary: The start point of the direction in which the longitudinal bars are distributed.

properties.name: StartPointOffsetType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the start point offset is either OFFSET_TYPE_LEG_LENGTH or OFFSET_TYPE_COVER_THICKNESS.

properties.name: StartPointOffsetValue
properties.summary: Gets or sets the concrete cover thickness or leg length at the first end of the bar.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: The width of the rectangle rebar mesh.
